name: Cinnamon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the brown sugar and cinnamon and set aside.
2. Cream the butter and sugar, then add the eggs. Add the dry ingredients alternately with the sour milk; mix well.
3. Pour half of the batter into a loaf pan. Sprinkle half of the cinnamon mixture over it and add the remaining batter. Sprinkle the remaining cinnamon mixture over it to give a marble effect.
4. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 60 minutes.
